narrative.narrative: Fear has tightened its grip as the Fear & Greed Index plunges to 27, mirroring the extreme risk-off sentiment that preceded the August 2024 bottom. Yet beneath the surface, stablecoin growth is quietly expanding—just as it did during that prior exhaustion phase—suggesting sidelined capital is accumulating while weak hands finish distributing. The market feels broken, but historically, this combination of peak anxiety and rising dry powder has marked the end of panic, not the beginning.
narrative.headline: Fear Peaks, Dry Powder Builds: Echoes of the August Bottom
